role: A read-only React region that visualizes live backend cognition as three ascending-detail altitudes: Pulse, River, and Nodes.
capabilities: Render an ambient Pulse glyph whose aperture dilates with turn cognition volume and failure state
Render a River SVG showing cast roles as converging tributaries sized by character contribution, with latent/failed states
Render a Nodes panel of role cards showing label, model, status, contribution, timing, trigger, and error
Map role lifecycle statuses to design-system tokens, falling back to registry node_states when registered
Consume live cognition data via AppContext (cognitionInfo projection + cognitionTurn fold)
Switch altitude level with local React state (0 Pulse, 1 River, 2 Nodes)
substance_why: The file implements all three documented altitudes, status token resolution, SSE-driven data binding, and a self-contained SVG River plus role-card Nodes panel.
interactions_present: Click the Pulse button to ascend to River (altitude 1)
Click 'river'/'nodes' header buttons to switch between altitudes 1 and 2
Click the close button to return to Pulse (altitude 0)
Title tooltips on Pulse and altitude controls
interactions_missing: No keyboard navigation or shortcuts between altitudes
No focus-visible or ARIA live region for active/failed thinking state
No reduced-motion support for the breathing ring animations
No click-through or expansion for individual role details/errors
No empty/error state handling when cognitionInfo or turn fields are missing
No resizable panel or copy/select interaction for role metadata
performance_risks: River SVG, cast arrays, and shape values are recomputed on every render without memoization
Each SSE update can re-render the entire component tree including all SVG paths and role cards
Cast length scales SVG DOM nodes linearly with no virtualization or capping
Inline style transitions on SVG radius/opacity may trigger paint during rapid updates
Heavy use of `any` typing prevents compile-time optimization and refactoring safety
reuse_why: The altitude model, status-token mapping, and registry-driven role visualization concepts are keepable, but the monolithic component, untyped data, and unoptimized SVG need restructuring for the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Extract Pulse into its own component/file
Extract River SVG rendering and marker defs into a dedicated component
Extract Nodes role cards into a reusable card component
Move statusToken and turn-shape calculations into a pure helper or custom hook
Split the altitude shell/state container from the three altitude views
